name: Potato & Mushroom Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add fenugreek leaves and cook until fragrant.
3. Add chopped onion and fry until soft and golden brown.
4. Stir in garlic, ginger, tomatoes, and coriander leaves.
5. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add chili powder, turmeric, salt, and hot water. Bring to a boil.
7. Add mushrooms and diced potatoes. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally until the potatoes are tender.
8. Sprinkle with garam masala before serving with Indian bread or rice.
